query:
SELECT 
  billingPlatform,
  description,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(lineAmount) as totalAmount
FROM billing_items
WHERE billingPlatform = 'OneBill' OR billingPlatform LIKE '%One%'
GROUP BY billingPlatform, description
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 30;
